mano_cua.result_summary: 导航到Menus和Selects演示页成功。展开下拉菜单后观察到菜单项完整可见,未被footer遮挡。但页面本身无明显固定footer元素,因此无法完全验证'被footer截断'的场景。mano-cua花大量步骤寻找footer元素但页面结构中似乎不存在典型footer。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Navigated to Menus/Selects demos. Expanded dropdown menus showed items fully visible without footer obstruction. Page structure does not appear to have a fixed footer element, making the footer-obscuring scenario difficult to reproduce.
